description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Complete your reunion RSVP so you are marked as attending with one guest, using a Saturday-evening-only ticket priced under $80 for yourself plus a corresponding guest ticket, choosing a vegetarian meal for you, and opting into both email and text updates.

tasks.instruction: Edit your profile so it lists your city as Denver, CO, has a bio of at least 100 characters, shows exactly three interests from the available options, and limits visibility to classmates only.

tasks.instruction: In the classmate directory, filter for people living within 25 miles of ZIP code 60601, sort the results by last name A–Z, and mark the first five in that list as favorites.
tasks.name: In the classmate directory, filter for people living within 25 miles of ZIP code 60601, sort the results by last name A–Z, and mark the first five in that list as favorites.

tasks.instruction: Sign up for exactly two non-overlapping volunteer shifts whose combined duration is at least 2 hours but no more than 3 hours, then confirm your volunteer schedule.
tasks.name: Sign up for exactly two non-overlapping volunteer shifts whose combined duration is at least 2 hours but no more than 3 hours, then confirm your volunteer schedule.

tasks.instruction: Using the seating chart for the Saturday dinner, reserve two available seats at a single table that already includes at least one of your favorited classmates and currently has at least two open seats.
tasks.name: Using the seating chart for the Saturday dinner, reserve two available seats at a single table that already includes at least one of your favorited classmates and currently has at least two open seats.

tasks.instruction: Make a class gift donation between $30 and $50 to the scholarship-focused fund and set its visibility so that only the donation amount is shown, not your name.
tasks.name: Make a class gift donation between $30 and $50 to the scholarship-focused fund and set its visibility so that only the donation amount is shown, not your name.

tasks.instruction: Build your personal agenda with exactly three in-person events: one on Friday starting after 5:00 PM, one on Saturday starting before 12:00 PM, and one on Sunday at any time.

tasks.instruction: From the recommended hotels, add one under $150 per night that includes free breakfast and is within 2 miles of the venue to your trip plan, saving it with check-in on the reunion Friday and check-out on the reunion Sunday.

tasks.instruction: In the discussion board, post a new memory in the memories category of at least 30 words and reply to two existing topics whose titles contain the word 'band' or 'yearbook'.
